name: Horizon Nepal
description: Architecture, engineering, and construction firm in Nepal. Published agents provide project information, blog content, 3D models, and building permit guidance.

a2a.description: General website information and content discovery

mcp.description: REST API for structured data access

capabilities.name: Project Portfolio
capabilities.description: Browse construction projects with details, images, and 3D models

capabilities.name: Blog & Insights
capabilities.description: Articles and guides on construction, architecture, and engineering in Nepal

capabilities.name: Building Permit Assistant
capabilities.description: Step-by-step workflow, document checklist, and municipality directory for Nepal's building permit process

capabilities.name: Cost Estimation
capabilities.description: Construction cost calculator with material pricing and labor rates

capabilities.name: Vastu Shastra Guide
capabilities.description: Vastu-compliant building design principles and configuration data

capabilities.name: FAQ
capabilities.description: Frequently asked questions about the company and services

capabilities.name: 3D Models
capabilities.description: Interactive 3D building models viewable in the browser

capabilities.name: Banners & Images
capabilities.description: Hero banners and featured images grouped by page slug

capabilities.name: Consultation Form
capabilities.description: Submit consultation requests on behalf of users

capabilities.name: Page Content
capabilities.description: CMS-managed page content with bilingual (en/np) support

capabilities.name: Page Sections
capabilities.description: Structured content sections by page, bilingual

capabilities.name: Site Settings
capabilities.description: Site configuration, contact information, social links, and analytics settings

capabilities.name: Team Members
capabilities.description: Company team member directory with roles and bios
